name: visa_gtm_ai
title: Analyst, GTM Strategy, Operations & AI Enablement
jd_text: Analyze sales, pipeline, revenue, and performance data using Excel, SQL, Tableau, or Power BI. Build repeatable analyses, KPI dashboards, AI-powered agents, automations, and post-sales intake workflows. Partner with Sales Operations, GTM, Product, and Enablement teams and translate findings into executive-ready stories.

name: linkedin_sales_strategy
title: Sales Strategy and Operations Associate
jd_text: Drive strategic planning, forecasting, customer segmentation, headcount and territory planning, quota setting, sales performance analysis, dashboards, and recommendations for senior sales executives. Requires Excel, PowerPoint, SQL, AI tools, stakeholder partnership, and cross-functional execution.

name: ninjatrader_business_operations
title: Business Operations & Strategy Associate
jd_text: Operate as an internal consultant, build business cases, conduct quantitative analysis, define KPIs, manage project timelines and cross-functional workstreams, prepare QBRs, automate workflows, and support AI adoption. Requires Advanced Excel, Google Sheets, financial modeling, SQL, Looker, Tableau, PowerPoint, and project management.

name: acosta_category_insights
title: Category Insights Manager (CPG)
jd_text: Create category-centric selling stories, analyze data, develop recommendations, maintain client reporting, build sales presentations, and manage project plans. Requires Excel, PowerPoint, Power BI, Circana IRI, Nielsen, 84.51, Market 6, Stratum, syndicated data, CPG math, VB, and advanced macros.
